details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level structure includes reports/audit/ (present) and reports/board/ (missing).

reports/board/ directory missing. All other governance contracts present: memory_bank/ has key docs (systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md, report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md), .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and spec files, reports/audit/ exists.

Scripts referencing moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py.
